summary: Tested two bug fixes: 1) Sidebar overflow fix - all 9 nav items now visible (Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Settings). 2) Data Saver toggle now functional - connected to AppContext, persists in localStorage (trucker_dataSaver), and affects map tiles (OSM vs Mapbox satellite) and shield rendering (SVG fallback).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Sidebar.tsx line 80 - nav section changed from overflow-hidden to overflow-y-auto, reduced py-3.5 to py-2.5, space-y-1 to space-y-0.5
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx line 429 - Data Saver toggle wired with initialValue={dataSaver} onChange={setDataSaver}
VERIFIED: App.tsx line 273-278 - dataSaver state with localStorage persistence (trucker_dataSaver key)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1362-1368 - dataSaver switches to OSM tiles when ON
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 971-987 - shield placement uses SVG fallback in data saver mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified: 1) Sidebar overflow fixed - all 9 nav items visible. 2) Data Saver toggle functional - localStorage persistence confirmed (trucker_dataSaver), map tiles switch between OSM (data saver ON) and Mapbox satellite (data saver OFF). Route calculation works with Data Saver on (25 shields, 4 exits, 4 speed limits placed). Console logs confirm: 'NavigationView: Data Saver ON — using lightweight OSM tiles' and 'NavigationView: Using Mapbox satellite-streets-v12 raster tiles'.

sidebar_overflow_fix.details: All 9 nav items visible: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Settings

settings_tab_clickable.details: Settings tab opens Settings view with 'System Configuration' header

data_saver_toggle_visible.details: Data Saver toggle found under 'SYSTEM & DATA' section with description 'Reduce map detail & POI fetching'

data_saver_toggle_on_off.details: Toggle can be toggled ON and OFF, visual state changes correctly

data_saver_localstorage_persistence.details: State persists in localStorage with key 'trucker_dataSaver' - verified values 'true' and 'false'

data_saver_osm_tiles.details: When Data Saver ON: 77 OSM tiles loaded, 0 Mapbox tiles. Console: 'NavigationView: Data Saver ON — using lightweight OSM tiles'

data_saver_mapbox_tiles.details: When Data Saver OFF: 0 OSM tiles, 24 Mapbox tiles. Console: 'NavigationView: Using Mapbox satellite-streets-v12 raster tiles'

route_calculation_with_data_saver.details: Route to Denver calculated: 545.9 mi, 7h 34m. 25 highway shields, 4 exit signs, 4 speed limit signs placed

shield_svg_fallback.details: Code verified: NavigationView.tsx line 971-987 uses SVG fallback when dataSaver is true

navigation_page_loads.details: Navigation page loads correctly with all sign types (shields, exits, speed limits)
